reason: Cannot write behavioral fail-to-pass tests for this bug. The fix (case-insensitive path comparison) only manifests on Windows (cfg!(windows)). On Linux, both buggy and fixed code produce identical results: cargo check succeeds, cargo test passes all 49 tests, and the structural presence of cmp_path is verified by successful compilation - not by behavior. Any behavioral test is therefore tautological (passes on base code) and fails test_not_tautological. Structural tests (grep/compile) would fail tests_verify_behavior_not_text. No rewrite can satisfy both rubrics simultaneously for this platform-specific bug. The fix can only be verified structurally (existence of cmp_path field + comparison_path function + their use in comparisons), which the judge has ruled is not behavioral.
